code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'../Styling/Toast.css';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";let globalEmit=null;export function emitToast(message){let ms=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:2500;if(globalEmit)globalEmit(message,ms);}function Toast(){const[msg,setMsg]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{globalEmit=(m,ms)=>{setMsg(m);setTimeout(()=>setMsg(null),ms);};return()=>{globalEmit=null;};},[]);if(!msg)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast",role:"status","aria-live":"polite",children:msg});}export default Toast;
